rationale: Gov't Code §2306.044 governs penalty acceptance and hearing requests before SOAH for housing violations. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.044. PENALTY TO BE PAID OR HEARING REQUESTED.
_note: Rule text concerns administrative penalty procedures for housing violations; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation.
